summary: M0-T020 (39th) accepted: Python dependency-policy enforcement (hash-pinned tooling lock + machine release-age gate + CI hardening). Gates G0/G2 orchestrator, G3/G4 code-reviewer PASS, G5 security-reviewer PASS (reports verbatim on main via PR #61). Production runtime lock requirements.txt BYTE-IDENTICAL (verified blob 7da554c pre==post). Invariants held: no services/api/app/** change, no M0-T018 artifact change, no npm/Playwright change. 3 non-blocking review observations dispositioned (no change required): full tooling-lock install (intentional; --require-hashes rejects single-pkg form), api pip-cache key (neutral; installs hash-verified), age-gate urllib.parse.quote (defense-in-depth; fixed-host lock-bound accepted). Ledger 39 accepted / 2 blocked / 8 backlog / 0 claimed. Ledger records + this checkpoint ride the M0-T020 acceptance control PR (owner-authorized; acceptance PR not yet merged). M0-T019 is next eligible but UNDISPATCHED (owner hold); all feature/credential/GDS/3D holds preserved.
